title: [Abandoned Inn, Dining Room]
description: Tables and chairs of deeply polished wood lend a simple elegance to this comfortable room.  Waiters and waitresses float between the tables, attending to the guests sitting at them, bringing food and drink to those who order it.  Thick glass windows provide a view of the outside, keeping out even the worst winds and inclement weather.  Happy chatter and savory, homelike smells fill the room with a sense of contentment.
